2026-03-28.text: Learned about Quarto multilingual blog setup with directory-based approach. Each post can have .ko.qmd alongside index.qmd for Korean translation.

2026-03-29.text: Explored custom SCSS theming in Quarto — overriding Bootstrap variables with Claude-inspired terracotta palette. Google Fonts Literata works great as a Copernicus alternative.

2026-03-30.text: Built a TIL tracker page with calendar view, sidebar list, and yearly heatmap. Used vanilla JS with JSON data file approach for static site compatibility.
